description: Delegate a complex, multi-step real-time task to a local CLI coding agent (codex / claude / gemini). The delegated agent can read files, run commands, and edit code autonomously, then returns its final result. The council invokes this when a goal needs full agentic execution beyond a single tool call.

inputs.name: goal
inputs.description: High-level task for the agent CLI to complete, e.g. 'fix the failing tests in ./'.

inputs.name: provider
inputs.description: claude | openai | gemini. Auto-detected to the first installed CLI if omitted.

inputs.name: cwd
inputs.description: Working directory for the task. Defaults to the current directory.

inputs.name: timeoutSeconds
inputs.description: Hard cap on the delegated run.

outputs.name: success
outputs.description: True iff the agent CLI completed with exit code 0.

outputs.name: provider
outputs.description: Which provider CLI ran the task.

outputs.name: binary
outputs.description: The CLI binary that was executed.

outputs.name: exitCode
outputs.description: Process exit code; null on spawn error/timeout.

outputs.name: error
outputs.description: Error detail when success is false; null otherwise.
